    • extractSelectedYear

      protected final java.lang.String extractSelectedYear(java.lang.String parameters, java.lang.String defaultYear)
      Extract selected year from parameters. Common utility method for extracting year parameter from page navigation.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the parameters string containing year in brackets
      defaultYear - the default year to return if no year found in parameters
      Returns:
      the extracted year string or default year
